demoMessage: Sample template — Karma Yangchen is a fictional artist; all images are placeholders

site.title: Karma Yangchen
site.description: Tibetan mixed media artist working in appliqué, thangka brocade, Cloisonné, pottery, and woodwork. Based in New York.

artist.name: Karma Yangchen
artist.title: Tibetan Mixed Media Artist
artist.tagline: Weaving the timeless essence of Tibetan heritage into the living world.
artist.bio: Karma Yangchen is a Tibetan mixed media artist specialising in appliqué, thangka brocade, Cloisonné, pottery, and woodwork. She has maintained studios in New York City and the Hudson Valley for over two decades, creating sacred objects and fine art for collectors and dharma centres worldwide.

contact.note: Available for commissions and dharma centre installations.
